summary: Addresses external review feedback with two targeted fixes: (1) adds empty FilterFactory validation in RenderPastePipeline with corresponding test, and (2) adds `continue` in ValidatePolicyRules so an empty key skips the redundant empty-value check, with test updated from expecting 2 errors to 1. Both changes are minimal, correct, and well-tested.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (empty Name, empty FilterFactory, duplicate Name, unknown Position, zero-value Position, empty pipeline, empty ConfigSection, duplicate ConfigSection, nil/empty inputs, mutation isolation)
Error paths tested with specific error message assertions
Happy path tested with realistic OpenStack pipeline/policy data

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing Gomega dot-import + NewGomegaWithT(t) convention
SPDX license headers and Feature: CC-0004 tracking present
Functions are focused and small (single responsibility)
No dead code or commented-out code
Clear, descriptive error messages with context (pipeline name, middleware name)

security_checklist.item: No user input reaches shell or exec calls (pure functions only)

architecture_checklist.item: Changes are minimal and scoped to the external review feedback
No Kubernetes API calls — all functions remain pure
Validation consolidated in single loop (fail-fast pattern)

fail_fast_checklist.item: Empty FilterFactory caught before duplicate-name and position checks
Empty key in ValidatePolicyRules skips value check via continue

defensive_checklist.item: All middleware fields validated (Name, FilterFactory, Position)
ConfigSection emptiness checked before map insertion
Output maps are copies — input mutation tests verify isolation
